item.title: Mypost
item.author: drnatashasth@gmail.com (Natasha Smith)
item.description: this is some posts i’ve written to date.

item.title: About Me
item.author: drnatashasth@gmail.com (Natasha Smith)
item.description: Welcome to my portfolio! I’m Natasha Smith, exploring the intersection of data, technology, and humanity. With expertise in data science and a passion for impactful insights, I’ve built a collection of projects to showcase my journey.

item.title: Blog
item.author: drnatashasth@gmail.com (Natasha Smith)
item.description: Welcome to my blog! Here, I share insights, tutorials, and reflections on the world of data science, technology, and its ethical implications.

item.title: Contact
item.author: drnatashasth@gmail.com (Natasha Smith)
item.description:
If you’d like to reach out, feel free to contact me via email or connect on social media. You can also check out my latest articles on Substack and Medium.

If my content resonates with you, consider following me on Medium and subscribing to my newly launched Substack, Never Oblivious.

Contact Options

  • Email:

  • LinkedIn:

  • GitHub:

  • Substack:

  • Medium:

item.title: Projects
item.author: drnatashasth@gmail.com (Natasha Smith)
item.description:
My Projects

Welcome to my project showcase. Below are highlights of my data science, AI, and machine learning projects. Click on each project for detailed insights.
